recipes.title: Grandma's Sunday Ragù
recipes.author: @nonna_lucia
recipes.description: A slow-simmered tomato and beef ragù passed down three generations.
steps: Season the beef and sear until deeply browned on all sides.
Add onion and cook until softened.
Stir in tomatoes and simmer on low for 3 hours.

recipes.title: Charred Corn & Feta Salad
recipes.author: @summerkitchen
recipes.description: Sweet charred corn, salty feta, and a lime-chili dressing.
steps: Char the corn over a grill until spotted black in places.
Slice the kernels off and toss with feta, lime, and oil.

recipes.title: Miso-Butter Salmon
recipes.author: @umami_ben
recipes.description: Flaky salmon glazed with a sweet-savory miso butter.
steps: Mix miso, butter, and honey into a glaze.
Spread over salmon and sear, then finish in the oven.

recipes.title: Spiced Chickpea Stew
recipes.author: @plantpowered
recipes.description: A warming one-pot stew with cumin, cinnamon, and coconut milk.
steps: Sauté the onion until soft.
Add cumin and cinnamon, stirring until fragrant.
Pour in tomatoes, coconut milk, and chickpeas, and simmer 20 minutes.

recipes.title: Blackberry Ricotta Galette
recipes.author: @floursugarbutter
recipes.description: A rustic free-form tart with juicy blackberries and creamy ricotta.
steps: Roll the dough into a rough circle.
Spread ricotta over the center, top with blackberries.
Fold the edges over and bake at 200°C for 35–40 minutes.

recipes.title: Smoky Black Bean Tacos
recipes.author: @tacotuesday
recipes.description: Chipotle-smoked black beans, quick pickled onion, and avocado crema.
steps: Quick-pickle sliced red onion in lime juice.
Warm the beans with chipotle powder, mashing lightly.
Fill warm tortillas with beans, onion, and avocado crema.

recipes.title: Lemon Herb Roast Chicken
recipes.author: @sundaysupper
recipes.description: Crisp-skinned roast chicken stuffed with lemon and thyme.
steps: Stuff the cavity with lemon and thyme.
Rub the skin with butter and season generously.
Roast at 220°C for 20 minutes, then 190°C for 55 minutes more.

recipes.title: Coconut Curry Noodles
recipes.author: @noodlebowl
recipes.description: Silky rice noodles in a fragrant coconut-lemongrass broth.
steps: Soak the noodles in hot water until tender.
Fry the curry paste, then add coconut milk and simmer.
Stir in noodles and lime juice before serving.

recipes.title: Brown Butter Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipes.author: @thebakingdiary
recipes.description: Nutty brown butter and flaky sea salt take a classic cookie somewhere new.
steps: Brown the butter until amber and nutty-smelling.
Whisk with sugars and eggs, then fold in flour and chocolate chips.
Chill 30 minutes, then bake at 190°C for 10–12 minutes.
